en.text: . beloved: or, beloved of God, your election
after that we had suffered before
: persecuted us: or, chased us out
. there unto: or, to sufferings, or, to persecution
. saints: or, holy ones, or, angels
. beseech: or, request exhort: or, beseech
. defraud: or, oppress, or, overreach in: or, in the matter
. prevent: or, come before, or, anticipate, or, precede
men. exhort: or, beseech unruly: or, disorderly
